headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Mondelez International, Raises Price Target to $65
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Bryan Spillane   maintains Mondelez International (NASDAQ:MDLZ) with a Buy and raises the price target from $62 to $65.

headline: Unilever: Market Undervaluing Its Transition To A Higher-Quality HPC Business
summary: Unilever (UL) pivots to Home & Personal Care after spin-offs, aiming for higher margins and growth. Read here for a detailed investment analysis.
